items.title: [In preview] Public Preview: Tool search in Microsoft Foundry toolboxes
items.summary: Microsoft Foundry adds tool search to Foundry toolboxes in public preview, giving developers and admins a fast way to find the right tool inside large, multi-team catalogs. As your toolbox grows, sending every tool definition on every turn gets expensive.
